ddls:
CREATE TABLE "dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency */,
  "module_name" TEXT /* Name of the module or dependency */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the module */,
  "license_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the license type */,
  "repository_url" TEXT /* URL to the repository of the dependency */,
  "license_url" TEXT /* URL to the license file */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project where the dependency is used */,
  "dependency_type" TEXT /* Type of dependency (e.g., library, framework) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dependency */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the dependency was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the dependency was last updated */,
  "last_checked_date" TEXT /* Date the dependency was last checked for compliance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependencies_license_id FOREIGN KEY ("license_id") REFERENCES licenses ("license_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependencies_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "licenses" (
  "license_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each license type */,
  "license_name" TEXT /* Name of the license (e.g., MIT, Apache-2.0) */,
  "license_text" TEXT /* Text content of the license */,
  "license_type" TEXT /* Type of license (e.g., permissive, restrictive) */,
  "is_approved" INTEGER /* Is the license approved for use */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("license_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the project was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the project was last updated */,
  "project_type" TEXT /* Type of project (e.g., web, mobile) */,
  "project_lead" INTEGER /* ID of the project lead */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dependency_hierarchy" (
  "hierarchy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hierarchy entry */,
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dependency */,
  "parent_dependency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent dependency (if any) */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project where the dependency is used */,
  "hierarchy_level" INTEGER /* Level of the dependency in the hierarchy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hierarchy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependency_hierarchy_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependency_hierarchy_dependency_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependency_id") REFERENCES dependencies ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependency_hierarchy_parent_dependency_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_dependency_id") REFERENCES dependencies ("dependency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, compliance officer, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dependency being accessed */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dependency_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependency_id") REFERENCES dependencies ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_checks" (
  "check_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance check */,
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dependency being checked */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project where the dependency is used */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date when the compliance check was performed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the compliance check (e.g., compliant, non-compliant) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments on the compliance check */,
  "check_type" TEXT /* Type of compliance check (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("check_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_checks_dependency_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependency_id") REFERENCES dependencies ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_checks_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_dependencies" (
  "project_dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project dependency */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dependency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_dependencies_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_dependencies_dependency_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependency_id") REFERENCES dependencies ("dependency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission name (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ci_cd_integrations" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "integration_type" TEXT /* Type of integration (e.g., Jenkins, Travis CI) */,
  "integration_url" TEXT /* URL of the integration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ci_cd_integrations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date when the log entry was created */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Log message */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Log level (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)
